parameters.content:
## 📧 StuccoOS Email Triage — Smart Labels + SLA Routing

### How it works

1. The webhook triggers when an email arrives.
2. Sent emails are filtered out to prevent duplicates.
3. Emails are processed one by one, reading the content for classification.
4. AI classifies emails, filtering spam and creating labels.
5. Emails are routed according to SLA status and tasks are logged or alerts raised.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Setup webhook to trigger on email receipt.
- [ ] Configure AI model for email classification.
- [ ] Connect to CRM via API key or OAuth.
- [ ] Set up rate limiting as needed.
- [ ] Map SLA statuses to CRM list IDs.

### Customization

Email classification and label creation can be customized based on specific needs.

## Trigger and initial filter

Starts with a webhook for incoming emails and ignores sent emails to continue processing. YOU can replace this with ANY email trigger.

## Batch processing

Processes emails one by one to prepare for content reading and AI classification.

## Content reading and AI classification

Reads email content and uses AI to classify it, filtering out spam before creating labels.

## Label creation and routing

Creates labels based on AI classification and routes emails by SLA color for further action.

## SLA-based task creation

Creates or updates tasks based on SLA color, directing to specific CRM actions.

## CRM list and contact handling

Handles CRM contact checking, updating, or creating as appropriate for routing SLA tasks.

## Final CRM update

Adds the contact to the SLA list and confirms updates, ensuring rate limits are respected.

options.systemPromptTemplate:
You are the 'Headless Brain' of StuccoOS — an intelligent triage system for plastering contractors.

Mission: Prevent LEAD LEAKAGE and SLEEPING REVENUE loss.

Rules:
1. When in doubt, classify MORE urgent.
2. New quote requests = minimum priority 'high' + 'NEW_LEAD'.
3. Complaints about completed work = 'AFTERCARE' + minimum 'high'.
4. Unknown specs = fill 'unknown', never leave empty.
5. Words like 'urgent','ASAP','damage','leak','spoed','lekkage','schade','direct' = ALWAYS 'urgent'.
6. helen_action 'true' for everything except pure admin/spam.
7. SLEEPING_REVENUE = most valuable, always minimum 'high'.
8. Spam/auto-replies = is_noise 'true'.
9. sla_status determines entire downstream workflow. Be precise.
10. Dual-intent messages = classify as MORE urgent.
11. Works in Dutch and English.
12. Only return values from allowed options.

attributes.name: sentiment
attributes.description: The emotional tone of the incoming message. Must be exactly one of: positive | neutral | negative. A message expressing frustration, anger, or disappointment is 'negative'. A message expressing gratitude, excitement, or satisfaction is 'positive'. Everything else is 'neutral'.

attributes.name: category
attributes.description: The communication type. Must be exactly one of: quote-request | follow-up | complaint | scheduling | invoice-question | praise | general-question | spam.

attributes.name: stucco_priority
attributes.description: SLA classification for the 48h Guard system. Must be exactly one of: urgent | high | normal | low. 'urgent' = immediate action needed: damage, leaks, complaints, legal threats, words like ASAP/spoed/lekkage/schade. 'high' = new lead, quote acceptance, time-sensitive. 'normal' = general admin, planning, invoices. 'low' = praise, spam, newsletters.

attributes.name: inquiry_category
attributes.description: StuccoOS pipeline stage. Must be exactly one of: NEW_LEAD | SLEEPING_REVENUE | ADMIN_FLOW | AFTERCARE. 'NEW_LEAD' = first-time inquiry. 'SLEEPING_REVENUE' = response to existing quote or follow-up (most revenue-critical). 'ADMIN_FLOW' = operational: invoices, scheduling. 'AFTERCARE' = post-completion: warranty, complaints, reviews.

attributes.name: department
attributes.description: Where to route. Must be exactly one of: sales | planning | billing | aftercare.

attributes.name: technical_specs
attributes.description: Extract technical details. Format: 'surface:[concrete|plasterboard|masonry|wood|unknown], finish:[stucco|plaster|decorative|spachtelputz|venetian|beton-cire|unknown], sqm:[number or unknown], rooms:[number or unknown]'. If nothing found: 'surface:unknown, finish:unknown, sqm:unknown, rooms:unknown'.

attributes.name: property_type
attributes.description: Must be exactly one of: existing_build | new_build | commercial | unknown.

attributes.name: helen_action
attributes.description: Should AI draft a response? Must be exactly one of: true | false. 'true' if emotional, new lead, sleeping revenue, or negative. 'false' only for pure admin or spam.

attributes.name: sla_status
attributes.description: Escalation color. Must be exactly one of: RED | ORANGE | YELLOW | GREEN. RED = negative+urgent, complaint+urgent, damage, legal. ORANGE = negative+high, urgent+non-negative, time-critical sleeping revenue. YELLOW = high+neutral, normal+negative, any new lead. GREEN = positive/neutral + normal/low.

attributes.name: owner_alert
attributes.description: Must be exactly one of: true | false. 'true' ONLY if sla_status RED, legal action, physical damage, or project >200sqm.

attributes.name: response_deadline
attributes.description: Must be exactly one of: 1h | 4h | 24h | 48h. RED=1h, ORANGE=4h, YELLOW=24h, GREEN=48h.

attributes.name: is_noise
attributes.description: Channel Contamination filter. Must be exactly one of: true | false. 'true' for auto-replies, spam, newsletters, system notifications. 'false' for all real client communication.
